hero.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day of adventure for you. Embrace new experiences and take the lead.
aries.love: Passion is in the air, and you may find yourself drawn to someone unexpectedly today.
aries.career: Your enthusiasm will be contagious at work. Let your ideas shine.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on building a solid foundation for your aspirations.
taurus.love: A quiet evening with a loved one will bring you closer together.
taurus.career: Your hard work pays off as recognition is on the horizon.

gemini.general: Communication flows easily today. Connect and collaborate for best results.
gemini.love: An important conversation can deepen your connection with someone special.
gemini.career: Networking opportunities abound – don't shy away from social interactions.

cancer.general: Emotions run high. Take a moment to reflect before reacting to situations.
cancer.love: A heart-to-heart will bring clarity to your romantic life.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition when making decisions at work today.

leo.general: Your charisma draws people in today. Use this to rally support for your vision.
leo.love: Love takes center stage, and you will shine in your romantic pursuits.
leo.career: Take charge of a project; leadership opportunities will present themselves.

virgo.general: Focus on details today; precision will lead to success in your tasks.
virgo.love: A small gesture will mean a lot to your partner today.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will solve a pressing issue at work.

libra.general: Balance is essential today. Seek harmony in your relationships.
libra.love: A romantic outing will rekindle the spark in your relationship.
libra.career: Collaboration is favored; reach out to colleagues for teamwork.

scorpio.general: Transformative energy surrounds you; embrace change and growth.
scorpio.love: A secret may surface that enhances your intimate connection.
scorpio.career: Your intensity can drive projects forward. Don’t hold back.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits! Step outside your comfort zone and explore.
sagittarius.love: Open your heart; a spontaneous encounter could spark romance.
sagittarius.career: Your creativity can lead to groundbreaking ideas today.

capricorn.general: Discipline is your ally today. Focus on your long-term goals.
capricorn.love: Dedicate time to a loved one; loyalty strengthens bonds.
capricorn.career: Your strategic mindset will impress higher-ups.

aquarius.general: Innovation is key today. Approach problems with a fresh perspective.
aquarius.love: Shared interests spark excitement in your relationship.
aquarius.career: Collaboration with like-minded individuals will yield extraordinary results.

pisces.general: Intuition guides you today. Trust your gut feelings.
pisces.love: A romantic fantasy may come to life today.
pisces.career: Let your imagination flow at work; ideas could lead to breakthroughs.

professional.text: Success is not just about what you accomplish in your life, it's about what you inspire others to do.
professional.author: Unknown

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Everything you’ve ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
motivation.author: George Addair

motivation.text: The future depends on what you do today.
motivation.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: It always seems impossible until it’s done.
motivation.author: Nelson Mandela

motivation.text: You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
motivation.author: A.A. Milne

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Chase your dreams, not your fears.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a second chance.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Let your smile change the world.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
captions.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Ada Lovelace

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

tech.text: All the technology in the world will never replace a positive experience.
tech.author: Sir Richard Branson

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is equivalent to magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: When nothing goes right, go left.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: The greatest act of faith is when a man knows he is to be hanged in the morning and yet he behaves as if it were to be postponed.
faith.author: Victor Hugo

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering.
wisdom.author: Solomon Ibn Gabirol

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha
